<!-- Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial -->

conceptual soundness
: Establishes the foundation of the record, covering the record overview, intended use and business use case, regulatory requirements, limitations, and the rationale behind the record selection. It emphasizes the record’s purpose, scope, and constraints, which are crucial for stakeholders to understand the record’s applicability and limitations.
